acceptance_criteria.criterion: Codex plugin default prompts are reduced from skill-by-skill choices to compact scenario choices.
acceptance_criteria.proof: .codex-plugin/plugin.json now has seven defaultPrompt entries instead of the previous eighteen.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Internal workflow stages are not exposed as default UI prompt choices.
acceptance_criteria.proof: tests/selftest.py asserts the defaultPrompt list does not include internal skill names such as task-router, context-indexer, session-lifecycle, evidence-manifest, route-guard, engineering-standards-governor, gpt55-auto-orchestrator, or design-md-aesthetic-governor.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The public metadata policy is documented.
acceptance_criteria.proof: README.md, README.zh-CN.md, and docs/architecture/API_CONTRACTS.md describe compact scenario-level default prompts.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No skills were deleted, renamed, or deprecated.
acceptance_criteria.proof: Skill catalog analyzer still reports 35 skills, 35 catalog entries, zero issues, and zero open consolidation candidates.

docs_refresh.reason: Codex plugin defaultPrompt is public metadata and now has a compact scenario-level policy.
